notes: Four-channel SecureFusion event manifest example (cabin / front / left / right). Channels are stored on disk in the same order they would appear after the canonical sort (channelId, ordinal codepoint comparison) so the on-disk shape and the canonical shape match exactly — but the verifier re-sorts before hashing, so an out-of-order on-disk channels array is still valid; the bundleHash is identical.
shape: Multi-channel example. Mirrors FleetFusion's SecureManifestBuilder shape — required v1 fields, optional tenantId + signerKeyId present, no dropped legacy fields.
ingestSource: fleetfusion (single-value enum in v1; see SPEC §6 Field Inventory).
